headline: Bristlemoon Global Fund’s Views on Fair Isaac Corporation (FICO)
summary: Bristlemoon Capital, a global equities firm, released its “Bristlemoon Global Fund” first-quarter 2026 investor letter. The Bristlemoon Global Fund returned -25.5 percent in the March 2026 quarter, with a -3.4 percent return for March 2026, net of fees. A copy of the letter is available to download here. This was the Fund’s most severe drawdown since […]

headline: Equifax: Downgrading To Hold On Near-Term Uncertainty
summary: Equifax is downgraded to Hold after a strong Q1 2026, with concerns about the sustainability of growth and margin leverage. Read more on EFX stock here.

headline: Watch CNBC's full interview with FHFA Director Bill Pulte
summary: Bill Pulte, U.S. Federal Housing Finance Agency director, joins 'Money Movers' to discuss mortgage rates, the Trump administration's housing-related priorities, Fed Chair Jerome Powell's legacy, and more.

headline: ‘It Has Ticked Off Literally Everybody in the Lending World’: Why Billionaire Steve Eisman Is Shorting This Software Stock
summary: This business has apparently gone too far with its price increases, and some lenders say they've had enough, even though the financials are soaring.
